name: Generate Random Integer
short_description: Generates a random integer within a specified inclusive range.

inputs.name: low
inputs.description: The lower bound (inclusive) for the random integer.

inputs.name: high
inputs.description: The upper bound (inclusive) for the random integer.

name: Financial Metrics Validation
short_description: Validates key financial metrics for an income statement, ensuring non-negative values and proper relationships between revenue, Cost of Goods Sold (COGS), operating expenses, and depreciation.

inputs.name: cogs
inputs.description: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS), cannot be negative and must not exceed revenue.

sympy_formulas.formula: check_revenue_positive and check_cogs_non_negative and check_operating_expenses_non_negative and check_depreciation_non_negative and check_cogs_vs_revenue and check_total_costs_vs_revenue

name: Gross Profit
short_description: A company wants to determine its Gross Profit by subtracting its Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) from its total revenue.

inputs.name: revenue
inputs.description: Total revenue generated by the company.

name: Operating Expenses Effect
short_description: A company wants to determine its Operating Profit by deducting Operating Expenses from its Gross Profit.

name: Depreciation - Double Declining Balance (DDB) Method
short_description: Calculates the book value of an asset at the end of the second year using the Double Declining Balance (DDB) depreciation method.

inputs.name: asset_cost
inputs.description: The initial cost of the asset.

inputs.name: useful_life
inputs.description: The estimated useful life of the asset in years.

name: Inventory Turnover and Days to Sell
short_description: Calculates how efficiently a company manages its inventory by determining the inventory turnover ratio and the average number of days it takes to sell inventory.

inputs.name: opening_inventory
inputs.description: Inventory value at the beginning of the period

inputs.name: closing_inventory
inputs.description: Inventory value at the end of the period

name: Deferred Tax Asset from Warranty Expense Temporary Difference
short_description: Calculates the Deferred Tax Asset (DTA) resulting from a deductible temporary difference when warranty expenses are recognized for financial reporting but are only deductible for tax purposes when paid.

inputs.name: reported_expense
inputs.description: Warranty expense recognized in financial statements under accrual accounting.

inputs.name: tax_deductible_now
inputs.description: Portion of warranty expense currently deductible for tax purposes.

inputs.name: tax_rate
inputs.description: Applicable income tax rate as a percentage (e.g., 25 for 25%).
